references.name: Bejamas — Neubrutalism UI Design Trend
observedPatterns: Monochromatic palettes with single accent color
Thick borders as primary visual structure
Monospace typography for labeling and metadata
Flat surfaces without shadows or gradients
adaptedElements: Single red accent (#E63946) on monochromatic gray base
2px solid borders as the dominant visual boundary element
Roboto Mono for all structural labels and metadata

references.name: DesignMantic — Brutalism in Web Design Guide
adaptedElements: 01-10 numbered navigation items in left panel
Construction-style breadcrumb trail and section headers
Archivo Black for blocky, heavy heading typography

references.name: Kittl — Brutalist Design Art Style
observedPatterns: Raw concrete texture inspiration for digital surfaces
Anti-decoration philosophy: no rounded corners, minimal shadows
Structural hierarchy through weight and scale rather than color
Exposed building blocks and inner workings as design feature
adaptedElements: Concrete gray palette (#E8E8E8 bg, #F5F5F5 surface, #D4D4D4 secondary)
All square corners, no decorative elements
Hierarchy through font weight (Archivo Black vs Archivo vs Roboto Mono)
System status footer, build date, version number as exposed metadata
